description: Cross-cutting tags for the tags_pipe field. Format: prefix:Value|prefix:Value. Prefixes are a closed set. Values within each prefix are a controlled but extensible vocabulary — new values may be added via the standard suggestion process.
note: sector and vertical dimensions are handled by primary_sector and domain_tags_pipe respectively. tags_pipe carries only cross-cutting dimensions that apply regardless of sector.

prefixes.label: Business Function
prefixes.description: The organizational or operational function the claim pertains to

prefixes.label: Risk Category
prefixes.description: The type of risk the claim describes, implies, or is relevant to

prefixes.label: Subject Topic
prefixes.description: A specific cross-sector subject the claim addresses

prefixes.label: Geography
prefixes.description: Geographic scope or location relevant to the claim

null_rule: tags_pipe may be NULL for nuggets where no cross-cutting dimension applies. This is valid and common.
